title: Self-improving AI, Opus 4.8, Nvidia bangers, game-ready 3D models, juggling robots: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers recent AI developments including Claude Opus 4.8, Step 3.7 Flash, DeepSWE, and various computer vision and robotics projects. The video showcases advances in 3D model generation, self-improving AI systems, and multimodal models. Coverage spans both model releases and research tools across vision, language, and embodied AI domains.
